title: campanula sibirica subsp. ciscaucasica
intro: Campanula sibirica subsp. ciscaucasica, also known as Siberian bellflower, is a flowering plant species native to the Caucasus region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Campanula sibirica subsp. ciscaucasica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
